hero.headline: Elevating the standard of construction in Puerto Rico

residential.title: Residential Remodeling
residential.description: Demolition, concrete, plumbing, electrical, kitchens and bathrooms. We transform residential spaces with premium finishes.

commercial.title: Commercial Remodeling
commercial.description: Restaurants, rooftops, offices and government projects. Commercial solutions that elevate your brand.

finishes.title: Architectural Finishes
finishes.description: Microcement, Venetian plaster and specialty coatings. European finishing techniques for unique surfaces.

coatings.title: Specialty Coatings
coatings.description: Rock and brick walls with Inimitez certification, custom textures and European decorative systems.

public.title: Public Projects
public.description: Acoustic ceilings, government specifications and phased budgeting for large-scale projects.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.description: Modern interiors, PVC panels, acoustic ceilings and countertops. Comprehensive space design.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Excellence in every project
about.description: At MasterSpace LLC we combine European technique with comprehensive project management to deliver exceptional results. From structure to final finishes, we control every phase of the construction process with the highest quality standards.
about.mission: To elevate the standard of construction and architectural finishes in Puerto Rico, combining innovative techniques with an unwavering commitment to quality and client satisfaction.
about.vision: To be the leading construction and architectural finishes firm in the Caribbean, recognized for our technical excellence, design innovation and commitment to every project.

inimitez.title: Inimitez Academy
inimitez.description: Specialization in decorative rock and brick, European decorative systems with advanced application techniques.

ambience.title: Ambience Architectural Coatings
ambience.description: Professional finishes, continuous surfaces, primers and sealers. Certified in architectural coating systems.

osha.title: OSHA 30-Hour
osha.description: Federal safety standards, government project readiness and comprehensive regulatory compliance.

t1.quote: MasterSpace completely transformed our home. The level of detail and quality of finishes exceeded all our expectations.
t1.name: María García

t2.quote: Top-notch professionals. The Venetian plaster work they did in our restaurant gave it a completely premium look.
t2.name: Carlos Rivera

t3.quote: Their knowledge of European finishing techniques is impressive. They delivered on time and with exceptional quality.
t3.name: Ana Martínez
